title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: GLADSTONE HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 18911 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Individuals with a household income below 250% federal poverty level Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am- 6pm, Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm (503) 655-8471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8471 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Accepts most OHP plans and some private insurance. Minimum $20 fee due at time of medical appointment for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday 8am-6pm, Wednesday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - PEDIATRIC CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GLADSTONE HEALTH CENTER
